chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D- 3938 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 18094/23 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 25.08.2023. Mr. Muhammad Adnan Motan,, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. G.M Bhutto, Assistant Attorney General. M/s. Khalid Rajpar and Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocates for Respondents along with Ms. Umme Kalsoom D.C. East, Farooq Ahmed (P.A), and Mr. Khurrum Rafiq, Principal Appraiser SAPT ________________ This Petition was filed being aggrieved with assessment of goods in question on the basis of a Valuation Ruling against which the Review Application stands dismissed and an Appeal against such review order is pending before the Customs Appellate Tribunal. Through an ad-interim order, goods were directed to be released by securing the disputed amount of duty and taxes with the Nazir of this Court, which stands complied with. Therefore, apparently, this Petition has served its purpose. In view of the above, this Petition stands disposed of, whereas, the fate of the amount lying with the Nazir of this Court shall be subject to final outcome of the Appeal pending before the Tribunal. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
